vocab.meaning: vấn đề về phong cách cá nhân
vocab.example: Wearing a watch is more of a matter of personal style for me than a functional necessity.

vocab.meaning: làm vướng víu/nặng nề cổ tay
vocab.example: I generally avoid wearing accessories because I don't like to clutter my wrist while typing on a laptop.
Modern smartwatches are true technological marvels, packing health tracking and GPS into a tiny device.
I believe a classic timepiece helps a person exude professionalism during high-stakes business meetings.

vocab.meaning: lựa chọn (thay vì cái gì khác)
vocab.example: I usually opt for a minimalist design with a clean face and a leather strap for daily wear.
Sports watches are highly resilient and can withstand extreme conditions like deep-sea diving or hiking.

vocab.meaning: sự hấp dẫn về mặt thẩm mỹ
vocab.example: I'm drawn to skeleton watches because the visible inner workings have a unique aesthetic appeal.

vocab.meaning: tích hợp một cách mượt mà
vocab.example: I love how smartwatches seamlessly integrate with other digital devices to manage my notifications.
In many cultures, owning a luxury watch brand is seen as a status symbol reflecting one's success.
Even though I have a phone, I find it much more convenient to keep track of time with a quick glance at my arm.
